headlines.title: U.S. and Iran exchange fire as Trump says ceasefire still holds
headlines.description: U.S. fighter jets struck two Iranian oil tankers accused of violating a U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz, as Iran launched new missile and drone attacks targeting the United Arab Emirates. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Virginia Supreme Court blocks congressional map favoring Democrats
headlines.description: The Virginia Supreme Court blocked a new Democratic-drawn congressional map from taking effect weeks after the voters narrowly approved the plan in a statewide vote. NBC News' Jane Timm explains how this delivers a major boost to Republicans as they defend their narrow House majority in the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Virginia Supreme Court blocks Democratic-drawn map voters approved
headlines.description: The Virginia Supreme Court on Friday blocked a new Democratic-drawn congressional map from taking effect, delivering a major boost for Republicans as they defend their narrow House majority in the midterm elections.

headlines.title: Alabama takes step toward a new congressional map while awaiting court action
headlines.description: Republican lawmakers passed a bill that would set up special primary elections if they are allowed to implement new maps after the U.S. Supreme Court’s redistricting ruling.

headlines.title: Tennessee Republicans pass map dividing up state’s lone majority-Black district
headlines.description: Tennessee’s Republican-led Legislature passed a new congressional map dividing up the state’s lone majority-Black district, swiftly responding to the U.S.

headlines.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine will not attack Putin’s military parade in Moscow in return for prisoner swap
headlines.description: There will be no neat rows of tanks and ballistic missile carriers rolling down the smooth cobbles of Moscow’s Red Square on Saturday, as Russia scales back what is usually a grand militaristic Victory Day parade celebrating the Soviet Union’s role in defeating Nazi Germany

headlines.title: New plan to evacuate Americans from Hantavirus cruise
headlines.description: The State Department is arranging a flight from the Canary Islands back to the U.S., where the 17 Americans on board the cruise ship will isolate at the national quarantine unit at Nebraska Medicine in Omaha. NBC News’ Daniele Hamamdjian reports.

headlines.title: Trump considering firing FDA head Dr. Marty Makary, source says
headlines.description: Though a final decision has not been made, a source familiar with the matter says President Trump is considering firing Dr. Marty Makary after frustration with his performance as FDA commissioner. NBC News’ Anne Thompson explains.

headlines.title: Schools across U.S. disrupted after Canvas education platform hacked
headlines.description: The parent company of Canvas, a popular, cloud-based education platform, says it experienced a cybersecurity incident this week. NBC News' Valerie Castro explains the impact this has had on students.

headlines.title: What do the Pentagon's UFO files contain?
headlines.description: NBC News' Courtney Kube joins "Here's the Scoop" to talk about the newly released UFO files by the Pentagon — and what they contained.

headlines.title: NAACP: Alito gave lawmakers 'playbook' to gerrymander
headlines.description: After Tennessee Republicans passed a new congressional map that broke up the state's only majority-Black district, NAACP General Counsel Kristen Clarke says the justification given by Tennessee lawmakers for the redistricting "lacks credibility."
